x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Unscheduled CIs generate false-positive alerts during patching and maintenance. These noise events pollute the alert corpus Now Assist uses for pattern recognition, degrading AI event grouping accuracy.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure maintenance schedules for planned downtime via cmn_schedule_maintenance_list.do. Associate schedules with relevant CIs. Maintenance windows suppress false-positive alerts that would otherwise pollute the Now Assist ITOM event correlation training corpus.
